scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage && npm run validate:contracts
scripts.format: biome format src assets scripts bin docs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json --write
scripts.format:check: biome check src assets scripts bin docs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false
scripts.lint: biome lint src assets scripts bin docs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint src assets scripts bin docs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json --write
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --clean --all --src dist --exclude "dist/tests/**" --exclude "dist/build.js" --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov -- node --test dist/tests/*.test.js
